Class AgentFeedbackCollector.APIGap

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.agentic.AgentFeedbackCollector.APIGap
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AgentFeedbackCollector
public static class AgentFeedbackCollector.APIGap extends Object implements Serializable
Record of a discovered API gap.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
